author: Nia Rivera
title: How AI is changing weekend productivity
body: I replaced my Sunday planning spreadsheet with a workflow board and reduced task spillover by 42%.

author: Marcus Lee
title: The rise of creator-owned sports media
body: Fans are now paying for direct athlete storytelling, and the engagement numbers are outperforming network clips.

author: Amina Patel
title: Finance communities are adopting short-form explainers
body: People consume 90-second market explainers more than long threads during volatile trading sessions.
